title.underBigWelcome: Start by making yourself an account here!

divider.or: or use a third party service

name.label: Name
name.helper: The name you will enter the website with. Required.

email.label: E-mail
email.helper: The E-mail will be used everytime you enter the website. Required.

password.label: E-mail password
password.helper: The password will be used everytime you enter the website with the E-mail above. Required. The white spaces in the start and the end of the password will be trimmed.

repassword.label: Re-type password
repassword.helper: Repeat the password you wrote above. Required.

signup.createdAccountMessage: Account created successfully! please verify your E-mail via the link we sent you!

error.general: An error occured, please try later.

email.nameTooShort: The provided name must be at least three characters long.
email.emailNotProvided: You must provide your E-mail address.
email.emailNotValid: Your E-mail is not valid. Please provide a valid one.
email.passwordNotProvided: You must provide the E-mail password.
email.passwordTooLong: Your password is way too long. it must be 100 characters max.
email.passwordTooShort: Your password is way too short. it must be 8 characters min.
email.passwordWeak: Your password is weak. It must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one special character.
email.repasswordNotProvided: You must fill the password repeating field.
email.passwordsDontMatch: The password and it's repeat must match but it isn't.
